understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete the KA59 puzzle game by solving each level, where a level is won only when every goal tile marked '+' is simultaneously occupied by a selectable piece (and if there are multiple '+', all must be covered at once).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions moved the currently selected piece in 3-pixel grid steps (x right/left, y down/up) unless blocked by walls/boundaries or other blocking objects; some adjacent objects could potentially be pushable, shifting with the selected piece when pushed. Levels could include multiple selectable pieces, and control could be switched by CLICKing a selectable's exact pixel position as listed in the state (not cell indices); the movement blocked flags were only hints and did not guarantee success or failure of a move.
